Your unwillingness to take no for an answer is admirable 😃. We just need to cancel the service. I'm not saying in the long term it wouldn't work out. But for right now we need to stop. Again, thanks for all you tried to do.

cause_analysis.narrative: Sunny Spa churned on 2026-03-23 after 201 days with Zoca. They sent an explicit cancellation request on 2025-12-19 via app_chat — 94 days before churn. Classification: explicit cancellation. The client formally asked to cancel; the question is whether a save attempt was made.
recommendations: [Retention] Cancellation was signalled 94 day(s) before churn via app_chat. Trigger an AM save call within 4 hours of any cancellation keyword — not a support response.
[Offer] Build a 3-tier retention offer ladder (pause / discount / scope change) so AMs have something concrete to counter with.
